/opt/cray/pe/mpich/9.0.1/ofi/gnu/12.3/bin/mpicxx -O3 -march=native -Wl,--whole-archive,-lhugetlbfs,--no-whole-archive CMakeFiles/mlp_train.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlp_train.dir/src/data/data_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlp_train.dir/src/mlp/mlp.cu.o CMakeFiles/mlp_train.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o mlp_train   -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/cuda/12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/cuda/12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/cuda/12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib:/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/math_libs/12.9/lib64 /opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/cuda/12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/math_libs/12.9/lib64/libcublas.so -ldl /usr/lib64/librt.a /opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/math_libs/12.9/lib64/libcublasLt.so /opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.5/cuda/12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libculibos.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
